title: Gaugescraft
description: Gaugescraft is an immersive exploration experience pack along with the technical features of the create mod and AE2.
body:
Gaugescraft is a modpack created for an immersive exploration experience along with the technical aspects of the create mod and AE2.

![World Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a66075d713af7971ca5a566986056c9172d3837e.jpeg)

World generation mods such as biomes o' plenty and William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere are included, A number challenging dungeon mods are also featured.

![Dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75af67c6624a6404bd4cadee6e96f8ee07431e6d.jpeg)

Shaders - [Bliss Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)
